allow: Bash(sqlite3 ~/.codex/logs_2.sqlite "SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table';")
Bash(sqlite3 -separator " | " ~/.codex/logs_2.sqlite "SELECT * FROM logs ORDER BY rowid DESC LIMIT 25;")
Bash(sqlite3 -separator " | " ~/.codex/logs_2.sqlite "SELECT * FROM logs WHERE level IN \('ERROR','WARN'\) ORDER BY rowid DESC LIMIT 15;")
